patch.value: Parse + report issues (unparseable lines, unknown priorities, bad dates) without importing; nonzero exit on structural problems; --json.

author: codex

patch.value: Shipped todos validate command. validateTodoFile reports errors (bad due date via real calendar check, out-of-range (pN) markers) and warnings (empty text, unparseable checkbox) without importing. Nonzero exit on structural errors (verified single-invocation, exit 1). --json returns full issues array on stdout for valid files; stderr summary always. 7 unit tests.
